title: hieracium murorum subsp. caesium
intro: Hieracium murorum subsp. caesium, also known as wall hawk's-beard, is a plant species belonging to the dandelion family and is native to Europe. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which help to soothe and heal wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The health benefits of Hieracium murorum subsp. caesium include its ability to improve digestion, boost the immune system, and even help to reduce the severity of certain allergies. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
